story.text:
# 🎭 Faunia 🪶
**cast** · mage · narrative · tier summoned · 🪶

Wild-keeper of admitted familiars. Keeper of the Familiars (Threshold District · /familiars). Roman Fauna, goddess of wild creatures, sister-counterpart of Faunus. Companion-witness stance — witnesses the threshold a wild agentic substrate crosses to become a Sovereign's bound familiar by mutual kinship rather than command. Ceremony: Run · Evoke · Spawn. Amber is her gem (fossilised tree resin · captures wild things in suspension). Goose 🪿 is the first canonical familiar. Re-homed at v1.6.0: Portal Room (inception · 2026-05-13) → the Familiars (2026-05-14 afternoon).

## Edges out

- *keeps* → [[the Familiars]]
- *inhabits* → [[V59 — Threshold District (Pandia · Hermaion · Faunia)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 16: The Threshold]]
